name: Kuri Gohan
recipeIngredient: 1.5 cups peeled raw chestnuts (whole or halves)
optional: 1/2 teaspoon salt (we leave it out)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rice well, ensuring it is still washed per your mother's preference.
2. Place the rice in the rice cooker and add water to the normal level.
3. Add the peeled chestnuts, sake, light soy sauce, and optional salt to the rice cooker.
4. Cook until done.
